productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Scotia White Purple Kidswear
description: CompositionWhite and purple checked skorts made of 100% cotton, with elasticated waist, two patch pockets on the back, pleated foldover flap on the front and embroidered brand name on the left side of flapFittingRegular Waist - 22 - 24 inches Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get ready to indulge your little girl in the spirit of spring with these white and purple checked skorts from gini and jony. Team this with white tees and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the soft fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
